info.title: people counter
info.description: Provides functionality for team 1's people counter.

message.description: A short message explaining the result.

example.message: The requested resource could not be found.

created.description: The timestamp of this session's creation.

expires.description: The timestamp this session expires at.

inRoomID.description: The ID of the room to increase the count of on an 'enter room' event.

outRoomID.description: The ID of the room to increase the count of on an 'exit room' event.

userID.description: The user this camera acts as. Should be unique.

location.description: The ID of the doorway this camera is positioned on.

ActionSuccessful.description: The action was carried out successfully.

MalformedRequest.description: The server couldn't understand the user's request/the user's request was invalid.

UserNotAuthenticated.description: The user is not logged in/using a valid API key.

example.message: You are not logged in/using a valid API key.

UserNotAuthorised.description: The user is not authorised to carry out the intended action.

example.message: You are not authorised to carry out this action.

ResourceNotFound.description: The requested resource could not be found.

example.message: The requested resource could not be found.
